_comment: Whitelist of registered contributor accounts for the $BNUT bounty system. Entries are added exclusively by the maintainer (@TheJollyLaMa) after personal onboarding (video call or direct contact). Do NOT submit PRs to self-register. Each entry tracks a contributor's GitHub username, their Optimism Mainnet wallet address, and cumulative BNUT earnings. Wallet addresses are required before any payout can be queued.

contributors.notes: Repo owner and maintainer. Update walletAddress to your Optimism Mainnet address to enable payouts.
GitHub Copilot AI contributor. Wallet address to be registered by the maintainer after onboarding.
